moves.name: Shadow Bolt
moves.effect: A shadowy thunder attack that may paralyze.
moves.tier3: BP: 90. Paralyze 1. The user can increase the range to Burst 1 around the target square.

moves.name: Shadow End
moves.effect: A shadowy aura ram attack that also rebounds on the user. The recoil damage for Shadow End is increased to 50% and cannot be prevented.

moves.name: Shadow Panic
moves.effect: A shadowy aura emanates to cause a confuse condition. Pokémon that are adjacent to the user get Confuse 4, two squares away from the user get Confuse 2, and three or more squares away get Confuse 1.

moves.name: Shadow Storm
moves.effect: A shadowy aura is used to whip up a vicious tornado. Shadow Storm’s area of effect becomes Difficult Terrain (Shadow) until the user’s next turn and provides concealment.
moves.tier3: BP: 110. The user can increase Shadow Storm to Cube 3.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.effect: The user focuses its willpower to its head and rams the foe. It may also make the target flinch. Zen Headbutt cures the user of Confusion when used successfully.

moves.name: Zap Cannon
moves.effect: Paralyzes opponent.

moves.name: Yawn
moves.effect: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls others into drowsiness.
moves.tier3: Drowsy 4. Alternatively, you may inflict Sleep 1 at the end of the affected Pokemon’s next turn.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.effect: The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors. X-Scissor ends any [Grabbed](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) conditions that the target was the source of.

moves.name: Wring Out
moves.effect: The higher the opponent's HP, the higher the damage.

moves.name: Wrap
moves.effect: Traps and squeezes the target. The target is Weakened while Wrap is active.
moves.tier2: The target gets a bane to Escape Grab rolls.
moves.tier3: The target gets a bane to Escape Grab rolls. Increase Wrap’s damage to 1/8th of the target’s maximum HP.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.effect: Changes the opponent's Ability to Insomnia.

moves.name: Work Up
moves.effect: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Attack stats increase by one stage each.

moves.name: Wood Hammer
moves.effect: The user slams its rugged body into the target to Attack. This also damages the user quite a lot. Wood Hammer gains a boost to its Power Roll equal to the difference in the user and the target's [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.effect: Swaps every Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Defense for 5 turns.

moves.name: Withdraw
moves.effect: The user withdraws its body in its hard shell, raising user's Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Wish
moves.effect: The user recovers HP in the following turn.

moves.name: Wing Attack
moves.effect:
The foe is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide.
Before the Power Roll, the user can expend all remaining movement speeds to give Wing Attack [Push 3](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.effect: A sinister, bluish white flame is shot at the foe to inflict a burn.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.effect: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. It also damages the user a little. Using Wild Charge will cure the user of [Drowsy](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).
moves.tier3: BP: 105. [Push 2](/1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) or deal damage equal to Wild Charge's recoil to all Pokemon in a [Burst 1](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) radius around the target.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.effect: Protects the user's team from multi-target Attacks.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.effect:
The affected area becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Flying) until the user’s next turn. In Trainer battles, Pokémon in the affected area are forced to swap to a random available Pokémon. 

If the Trainer has no available Pokémon to swap to or the affected Pokémon is wild, [Fear 2](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc).

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.effect: Moves targeting Pokémon within the vortex gain an edge. When a Pokémon moves through the vortex barrier, it gets Confused 2 and moves targeting it get a double edge until its next turn. Increase Whirlpool’s range to 6 Cube 3 when the targeted square is water.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.effect: Move's power and type changes with the weather.

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.effect: The user charges the foe at an awesome speed. May cause flinching. The user may elect to end the move one square beyond the area of effect as the move resolves.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.effect: The higher the user's HP, the higher the damage caused.

moves.name: Water Sport
moves.effect: The user soaks the battlefield with water, weakening Fire-type moves. Pokemon within the area of effect resist Fire-type damage one step further.
moves.tier2: Water Sport lasts for 4 turns. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Water).
moves.tier3: Water Sport lasts for 5 turns. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Water). Pokemon within the area of effect resist Fire-type damage an additional step.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.effect: An Attack with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe.

moves.name: Water Pledge
moves.effect: Added effects appear if preceded by Fire Pledge or succeeded by Grass Pledge.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.effect: The foe is blasted with a forceful shot of water.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. Push 3. The user may have Water Gun become a [Line](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) area of effect between the user and the target.

moves.name: Wake-Up Slap
moves.effect: Power doubles if opponent is asleep, but wakes it up.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.effect: The user electrifies itself and charges the target to inflict damage. This also damages the user and may leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.effect: After making its Attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting. The user's trainer can swap in another Pokemon at the user's current location.
moves.tier3: BP: 85. When the trainer swaps in a new Pokemon this turn, they can target any square in their starting zone in addition to the user's current position.

moves.name: Vital Throw
moves.effect: If the user is acting last in a round, Vital Throw gains a double edge.

moves.name: Vise Grip
moves.effect: Huge, impressive pincers grip and squeeze the foe.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) is Grabbed and gets a bane to all power rolls except Escape Grab.

moves.name: Vine Whip
moves.effect: Strikes the target with slender, whiplike vines.
moves.tier3: BP: 55. The user may Grab the target.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the target is [Poisoned.](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)

moves.name: Vacuum Wave
moves.effect: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the target. User gains 2 surges when Vacuum Wave targets a Pokemon that has used a Sound move since the beginning of its last turn.

moves.name: V-create
moves.effect: Lowers user's Defense, Sp. Defense and speed.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.effect: The user attacks in an uproar that heals and prevents the [Sleep and Drowsy ](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)conditions from all combatants. While Uproar is active, the user’s Action can only be used to continue Uproar. Uproar lasts 3 turns.
moves.tier2: BP: 90. Enemy Status moves get a bane until the user’s next turn.
moves.tier3: BP: 105. Enemy Status moves get a bane until the user’s next turn. The area in a Burst 2 radius around the user becomes Difficult Terrain (Normal) until the user’s next turn.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.effect: After making its Attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting. The user's trainer can swap in another Pokemon at the user's current location.
moves.tier3: BP: 85. When the trainer swaps in a new Pokemon this turn, they can target any square in their starting zone in addition to the user's current position.

moves.name: Twister
moves.effect: May cause flinching. Hits Pokémon using Fly/Bounce with double power.

moves.name: Twineedle
moves.effect: The user damages the target twice in succession by jabbing it with two spikes. This may also poison the target. Make two separate Power Rolls for Twineedle.

moves.name: Trump Card
moves.effect: The lower the PP, the higher the power.

moves.name: Triple Kick
moves.effect: Hits thrice in one turn at increasing power.

moves.name: Trick Room
moves.effect:
The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon seem to move more quickly. Trick Room reverses the move order within each priority bracket so that Pokémon with a lower Speed stat move first.

Trick Room lasts five turns.
moves.tier3: Pokémon with Speed as their lowest stat raise all of their movement speeds by one rather than lowering them.

moves.name: Trick
moves.effect: Swaps held items with the opponent.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.effect: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam Attack. May also paralyze, burn, or freeze the target.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. Roll a d6 to choose between [Paralyze](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4), [Frostbite](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4), and [Burn](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4). Pokemon in the area of the effect receive 3 turns of the chosen effect.

moves.name: Transform
moves.effect: Assume the form of the target. The user gains all of the target's STATs, moves, and Abilities, and copies its weight and height and Innate Features. Transform lasts until the user is switched out, KO'd or until the end of the battle. The user may choose to end the transformation on its turn as a free action, regaining its previous Move List. The user's current and Max HP do not change from using Transform.

moves.name: Toxic Spikes
moves.effect: The user lays a trap of poisonous spikes at the opposing team's feet. Enemy Pokemon that switch in while Toxic Spikes is active are Poisoned 2. Flying-type and Levitating Pokemon are not injured by Spikes. You and your allies can control up to 3 separate instances of Toxic Spikes on the battlefield at once. If theres two layers or more, Pokemon are badly poisoned instead.
moves.tier2: The area of effect becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Poison) for two turns.
moves.tier3: The area of effect becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Poison) for three turns. Enemy Pokemon lose 1/8th of their maximum HP when they move into the area of effect without shifting.

moves.name: Toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons opponent.

moves.name: Torment
moves.effect: The user torments and enrages the foe, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

moves.name: Tickle
moves.effect: The user tickles the foe into laughing, reducing its Attack and Defense stats by one stage.
moves.tier3: If the target is using a Multiturn move, the user may have that move end.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.effect: A strong electric blast is loosed at the target. It may also leave the target with paralysis.
moves.tier3: BP: 105. Thunderbolt's area of effect expands to [Burst 1](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) around the target square. Paralyze 2.

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.effect: A weak electric shock that is sure to cause paralysis if it hits.
moves.tier3: [Paralyze 4](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4). Allied moves targeting Pokemon paralyzed this way gain an edge until Paralysis wears off.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.effect: A jolt of electricity is hurled at the target to inflict damage. It may also leave the target with paralysis. This move gains an edge when targeting a Pokemon 2 or more squares above the user in elevation.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.effect: The target is punched with an electrified fist. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

moves.name: Thunder Fang
moves.effect: May cause flinching and/or paralyze opponent.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.effect: The user calls forth a thundercloud that persists above the area of effect. Upon use, the user can call forth a lightning strike to Attack a target Pokemon within the area of effect. That Attack automatically hits in Rain. The user can also make that same Attack against any creature that begins its turn inside the area of effect. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Electric) while Thunder is in effect.
moves.tier1: BP: 95. Thunder lasts until next turn.

moves.name: Thrash
moves.effect: A rampage of 2 to 3 turns that confuses the user.
moves.tier1: BP: 100. Thrash ends and the user becomes [Confused 4](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) unless this is the first turn of Thrash.
moves.tier2: BP: 120. Thrash ends and the user becomes [Confused 4](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) unless this is the first or second turn of Thrash.

moves.name: Thief
moves.effect: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

moves.name: Teleport
moves.effect: Moves the user around the battlefield in a pinch. During battle, Teleport can be used as a Maneuver. Outside of battle, can teleport user & Trainer to any location that both of them have visited before, but can only be used this way 1/x per day.
moves.tier1: The user teleports up to 4 squares away from their current position.
moves.tier2: The user teleports up to 6 squares away from their current position.
moves.tier3: The user teleports up to 8 squares away from their current position.

moves.name: Telekinesis
moves.effect: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns, but cannot be hit by Ground-type moves. While floating this way, the target’s movement speeds besides Fly and Swim are halved, Stability becomes 0, and Evasion becomes -1. If the user begins Telekinesis on another target, the original instance of Telekinesis ends.
moves.tier1: Telekinesis lasts until the user’s next turn.
moves.tier3: The user may have the target's [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stage become -2. Telekinesis lasts three turns.

moves.name: Teeter Dance
moves.effect: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses the Pokémon around it. Each Pokemon in the area of effect at the beginning or end of the move is affected.

moves.name: Techno Blast
moves.effect: Type depends on the Drive being held.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.effect: The foe is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only damaging moves. When a target is Taunted this way, damaging moves that don’t target Taunt’s user get a bane.
moves.tier3: [Taunt 99](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57). The next move the target uses gets a bane.

moves.name: Take Down
moves.effect: A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. It also damages the user a little.
moves.tier3: BP: 110. [Push 3](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). The target is knocked prone.

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.effect: Increases the speed of the user and all allied Pokemon by 2 stages.
moves.tier2: Tailwind lasts 4 turns. Choose a direction. Moving in that direction costs half movement speed while Tailwind is active, and moving against it costs double.
moves.tier3: Tailwind lasts 5 turns. Choose a direction. Moving in that direction costs half movement speed while Tailwind is active, and moving against it costs double. The user and allied Pokemon may choose to ignore this effect.

moves.name: Tail Whip
moves.effect: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary and lowering their Defense stat by one stage.
moves.tier3: Affected Pokemon can't take reactions until their next turn.

moves.name: Tail Slap
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: Tail Glow
moves.effect: The user stares at flashing lights to focus its mind, raising its Sp. Attack stat by two stages.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The next beam move used by this Pokemon gains an edge.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.effect: A physical attack in which the user charges, full body, into the foe.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. [Push 1](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). The target is knocked prone.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.effect: User recovers HP. Amount varies with the weather.

moves.name: Synchronoise
moves.effect: Using an odd shock wave, the user inflicts damage on any Pokémon of the same type in the area around it. Synchronoise damages all Pokémon that share at least one type with the user. If the user has multiple types, any Pokémon that has any of those types will be damaged.
moves.tier3: BP: 140. The user can elect to either extend the range to Burst 5 or inflict [Fear 2](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc).

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.effect: A frenetic dance of fighting. It raises the user's Attack stat by two stages.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The next Slice move used by this Pokemon gains an edge.

moves.name: Switcheroo
moves.effect: Swaps held items with the opponent.

moves.name: Swift
moves.effect: Ignores changes to the user & target's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) to always hit.
moves.tier2: BP: 60. The user may move up to half of their highest movement speed, rounded down.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. The user may Shift up to half of their highest movement speed, rounded down.

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.effect: Lowers the [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) of all enemy Pokemon in the area of effect by one stage. Sweet Scent fails when the weather is not Clear.
moves.tier3: The next move that targets an affected enemy Pokemon gets an edge.

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.effect: Confuses opponent.

moves.name: Swallow
moves.effect: The more times the user has performed Stockpile, the more HP is recovered.

moves.name: Swagger
moves.effect: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, it also raises the target's Attack stat by two stages.
moves.tier3: [Confuse 4](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57). The user may target an additional Pokemon in range with Swagger.

moves.name: Surf
moves.effect: The battlefield is swamped by a giant wave. The user transports themselves to the ground point opposite their starting point on the area of effect cube.
moves.tier3: BP: 110. The ground in the area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Water) until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Supersonic
moves.effect: Emits bizarre sound waves that cause confusion.
moves.tier1: All Pokemon in the area of effect that are not at maximum HP are [Confused 1](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).
moves.tier3: The user may extend the range to [Cone 3](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e). Confuse 3.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.effect: Lowers user's Attack and Defense.

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.effect: Sharp-fanged Attack that always cuts half the target's HP.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.effect: Makes it sunny for 5 turns.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.effect: User Attacks first, but only works if opponent is readying an Attack.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.effect: The user loses 25% of its max HP and creates a substitute with that amount of HP. The substitute looks identical to the user and occupies the same square as the user. The substitute mimics the user's movements and actions, becoming indistinguishable from the user. Any time the user would take damage while the substitute is active, the substitute take the damage instead. Once the substitute is reduced to 0 HP it is destroyed.

moves.name: Submission
moves.effect: The user grabs the target and recklessly dives for the ground. It also hurts the user slightly.
moves.tier1: BP: 45. Both the user and the target become Prone.
moves.tier3: BP: 100. The target becomes Prone and can't take reactions until their next turn.

moves.name: Stun Spore
moves.effect: Directs a puff of concentrated numbing spores towards an enemy to paralyze them. Grass-type and Electric-type Pokemon are immune to spore.

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.effect: The user Attacks by struggling. Affected enemies have their Sp. Attack lowered by one stage. The user can spend an additional 4 pp to extend Struggle Bug’s range to Burst 3.

moves.name: Struggle
moves.effect: Don't think we need this///can be in rules.

moves.name: String Shot
moves.effect: Lowers the opponent's speed by two stages.

moves.name: Strength
moves.effect: Builds enormous power, then slams the foe.

moves.name: Storm Throw
moves.effect: Always results in a critical hit.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.effect: Power increases when user's stats have been raised.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.effect: High critical hit ratio.

moves.name: Stomp
moves.effect: The foe is stomped with a big foot. It may make the foe flinch.
moves.tier2: BP: 65. The target cannot take reactions until their next turn.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. [Flinch](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) and cannot take reactions until their next turn.

moves.name: Stockpile
moves.effect: Stores energy for use with Spit Up and Swallow.

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.effect: Stiff wings strike the foe. May raise the user's Defense. The user can expend all remaining movement speeds to give Steel Wing [Push 3](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).
moves.tier3: BP: 85. The user's Defense increases by one stage.

moves.name: Steamroller
moves.effect: The user crushes its target by rolling over the target with its rolled-up body. This may also make the target flinch.
moves.tier2: BP: 65. The target is knocked prone.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. The target is knocked prone. [Flinch](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.effect: Creates a spire of sharp rocks on the target point. Whenever an opposing Pokemon enters the battle, they take Rock-type damage

moves.name: Spore
moves.effect: Directs a puff of concentrated spores towards an enemy to make them sleepy. Grass-type Pokemon are immune to spore.

moves.name: Splash
moves.effect: A move that involves only flopping and Splashing around. It has no effect.
moves.tier3: The user flips and flops back and forth several times, creating a small splash of water each time.

moves.name: Spite
moves.effect: The opponent's last move loses 2-5 PP.

moves.name: Spit Up
moves.effect: Power depends on how many times the user performed Stockpile.

moves.name: Spikes
moves.effect: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team's feet. Enemy Pokemon that switch in while Spikes is active lose 1/8th of their maximum HP. Flying-type and Levitating Pokemon are not injured by Spikes. You and your allies can control up to 3 separate instances of Spikes on the battlefield at once.
moves.tier2: The area of effect becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Normal) for two turns.
moves.tier3: The area of effect becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Normal) for three turns. Enemy Pokemon lose 1/8th of their maximum HP when they move into the area of effect without shifting.

moves.name: Spike Cannon
moves.effect: Sharp spikes are fired at the foe to strike two to five times in rapid succession. When Spike Cannon hits four or more times, the target gets -2 to [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c). BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 6, 9, 12

moves.name: Spider Web
moves.effect: Opponent cannot escape/switch.

moves.name: Spark
moves.effect: May paralyze opponent.

moves.name: Spacial Rend
moves.effect: High critical hit ratio.

moves.name: Sonic Boom
moves.effect: Launches shock waves that always inflict 20 HP damage.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.effect: A two-turn Attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn. Any active areas of effect that obscure visibility touched by the beam's path are dispelled. In Harsh Sunlight, skip immediately to T2. T1: Gather light. T2: Make Power Roll and Attack.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.effect: Heals the user by up to half its full HP. Outside of combat it can be used to transfer health to an ally Pokemon for up to 20% of the user's maximum HP.

moves.name: Soak
moves.effect: The user shoots a torrent of water at the target and changes the target's type to Water.
moves.tier2: [Push](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) X, where X was the target's former number of types.
moves.tier3: [Push](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) X*2, where X was the target's former number of types.

moves.name: Snore
moves.effect: An Attack that can be used only if the user is [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4). The harsh noise may also make the foe flinch. Snore affects opponents that are behind a Substitute.

moves.name: Snatch
moves.effect: Steals the effects of the opponent's next move.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.effect: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Attack stat of opposing Pokémon.
moves.tier2: BP: 55. Lower Sp. Attack by one stage.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. The user may have Snarl's range become [Cone 4](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e). Lower Sp. Attack by one stage. Fear 2.

moves.name: Smokescreen
moves.effect: An obscuring cloud of smoke or ink reduces [accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c). A sufficient wind will disperse the cloud. Moves used by Pokemon or targeting Pokemon within Smokescreen's area of effect suffer an [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) penalty of 3 stages.
moves.tier2: Smokescreen lasts for 3 turns. The user is only penalized one [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stage on their own moves.
moves.tier3: Smokescreen lasts for 4 turns. The user is not penalized on thier own moves.

moves.name: Smog
moves.effect: May poison opponent. The area of effect may be dispersed with a significant wind.
moves.tier2: BP: 30. [Poison 2](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4). Smog persists until the end of the user's next turn. Pokemon that end their turn in Smog are [Poisoned 2](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).
moves.tier3: BP: 40. [Poison 4](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4). Smog persists for 2 turns. Pokemon that end their turn in Smog are [Poisoned 4](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).

moves.name: Smelling Salts
moves.effect: Power doubles if opponent is paralyzed, but cures it.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.effect: The user throws a stone or projectile to Attack an opponent. A flying Pokémon - or a Pokémon in the air for any other reason, like Levitate or Magnet [Pull](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) - will fall to the ground when hit by Smack Down.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. Allies that target that Pokémon until the beginning of its next turn get an edge.

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.effect: May poison opponent.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.effect: May poison opponent.

moves.name: Sludge
moves.effect: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.effect: User performs one of its own moves while sleeping.

moves.name: Sleep Powder
moves.effect: A sleep-inducing dust is scattered in high volume around a foe.

moves.name: Slash
moves.effect: The foe is attacked with a slash of claws, etc. This move's [Critical Range](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) is extended by 1.

moves.name: Slam
moves.effect: Reaches out to slam the foe with a long tail, vine, etc.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. Enemies smaller than the user are grabbed.

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.effect: User recovers half its max HP.

moves.name: Sky Uppercut
moves.effect: An uppercut thrown as if leaping into the sky. Sky Uppercut can target Pokemon in a vertical column 4 squares tall above [Melee](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range, and can hit Pokemon in the first turn of Fly.

moves.name: Sky Drop
moves.effect: Takes opponent into the air on first turn, drops them on second turn.

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.effect: Searches out weak spots, then strikes the next turn. May cause flinching. T1: User becomes cloaked in a harsh light. T2: [Charge](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) and make Power Roll.

moves.name: Skull Bash
moves.effect: Tucks in the head, then Attacks on the next turn. T1: Raises Defense by one stage. T2: [Charge](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) and make Power Roll.

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.effect: The user swaps Abilities with the opponent.

moves.name: Sketch
moves.effect: Permanently copies the opponent's last move.

moves.name: Sing
moves.effect: Makes Pokemon in the area of effect [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).
moves.tier3: Pokemon of the user's choice in range are [Drowsy 4](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).

moves.name: Simple Beam
moves.effect: Changes target's ability to Simple.
moves.tier3: The user may have Simple Beam's range become a line between the user and the target.

moves.name: Silver Wind
moves.effect: May raise all stats of user at once.

moves.name: Signal Beam
moves.effect: The user Attacks with a sinister beam of light. This may also confuse the target. Pokemon within 6 squares lose the Hidden status from the user and its allies.

moves.name: Shock Wave
moves.effect: The user strikes the foe with a quick jolt of electricity. Shock Wave ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) to always hit.

moves.name: Shift Gear
moves.effect: Raises user's Attack and sharply raises speed.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.effect: The user breaks its shell, lowering its Defense and Sp. Defense stats by one stage but raising Attack, Sp. Attack, and speed stats by two stages.
moves.tier3: Double all movement speeds until end of turn.

moves.name: Sheer Cold
moves.effect: One-Hit-KO, if it hits.

moves.name: Sharpen
moves.effect: The user lowers its polygon count to make itself more jagged, raising the Attack stat by one stage.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.effect: The user extends their shadow away from their current location up to a number of squares equal to their greatest movement speed, then can make a Power Roll targeting a Pokemon within [Melee](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range of their shadow. The shadow can move as any shadow cast by light would: across chasms, up cliff faces, and through translucent obstacles.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. The user may teleport to their shadow's location.

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.effect: The user throws a punch from the shadows. Shadow Punch ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) to always hit.

moves.name: Shadow Force
moves.effect: Disappears on first turn, Attacks on second. Can strike through Protect/Detect.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.effect: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. It has a high critical-hit ratio. Shadow Claw gains an additional edge to Attacking while Hidden.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.effect: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. It may also lower the target's Sp. Defense stat. Shadow Ball has a range of [Target 16](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) when targeting a Pokemon in darkness.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. Reduce Sp. Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Self-Destruct
moves.effect: The user Attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.effect: Throws the target ([Slide 3](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f)), then inflicts damage corresponding to user's level.
moves.tier1: Deals damage equal to 4x the user's Trainer level.
moves.tier2: Deals damage equal to 5x the user's Trainer level.
moves.tier3: Deals damage equal to 6x the user's Trainer level. Increase the forced movement to [Slide 5](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).

moves.name: Seed Flare
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.effect: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the foe from above. Seed Bomb can arc over walls to target Pokemon with a known location that the user cannot see; when used this way, it gains a bane to its Power Roll. Seed Bomb gains an additional edge to its Power Roll from high ground.

moves.name: Secret Sword
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Secret Power
moves.effect: The user Attacks the target with a secret power
moves.tier3:
Inflict a different effect depending on the environment surrounding
the user. The Pokemaster can determine the move in Sp. circumstances. 

Building, city, plains: Paralysis 3
Cave: Flinch
Sand, dirt, rock: -1 [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stage
Clear Water: -1 Attack stage
Swamp, Marsh: -1 speed stage
Ice, Snow: Frostbite 3
Volcano, Fire: Burn 3
Forests, foliage, jungle: Drowsy 3
Ruins, burial ground: Flinch
Flying, sky: -1 speed stage

moves.name: Searing Shot
moves.effect: May burn opponent.

moves.name: Screech
moves.effect: An ear-splitting screech is emitted to reduce the foe's Defense by two stages.
moves.tier1: Lower Defense by one stage instead.
moves.tier3: Affected Pokemon cannot take Reactions until the beginning of their next turn.

moves.name: Scratch
moves.effect: Hard, pointed, and sharp claws rake the foe to inflict damage. May inflict [Bleed](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.effect: A horrific look that scares the victim, sharply reducing the target's Speed. Scary Face gain an additional [Fear 1](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc) when targeting an adjacent Pokémon.

moves.name: Scald
moves.effect: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.effect: Creates a sandstorm for 5 turns.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.effect: Pokémon within the vortex are [Weakened](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc). When a Pokémon moves through the vortex barrier, it gets [Slowed ](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc)2 and the next move it uses takes a double bane.

moves.name: Sand Attack
moves.effect: Lowers the [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) of Pokemon in the area of effect by two stages.
moves.tier3: Increase the area of effect to [Cone 3](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e).

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.effect: Allied Pokemon within the area of effect cannot gain status conditions. Upon use, the user can choose to keep the area static or move it with the user while active.
moves.tier3: Safeguard lasts for 6 turns. Cure a status condition of one Pokemon within range on use.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.effect: The user Attacks by slicing with its long horns. The target's Defense and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stat changes don't affect this Attack's damage.

moves.name: Sacred Fire
moves.effect: May burn opponent.

moves.name: Round
moves.effect: The user Attacks the target with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the Attack do greater damage. Round's base power is doubled if an allied Pokemon has used it during this round of combat. Round's [Reaction](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) tag can be ignored. When used as a [Reaction](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e), Round can target the triggering move's target regardless of distance or obstacle. Trigger: An allied Pokemon uses Round.

moves.name: Roost
moves.effect: User recovers half of its max HP and loses the Flying type temporarily.

moves.name: Rollout
moves.effect: A 5-turn rolling attack that doubles the base power, starting at 30, each time it hits. The power resets if Rollout misses or fails for any reason. Rollout's power starts at 60 if the user has used Defense Curl during this combat.
moves.tier2: Free the user from Grabbed and Trapped.  [Push 1](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).
moves.tier3: Free the user from Grabbed and Trapped. Push 3. The user can ignore [Charge](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) tag on Rollout for this turn.

moves.name: Rolling Kick
moves.effect: The user cuts a quick spin and lashes out with a sharp kick. It may make the opponent flinch.

moves.name: Role Play
moves.effect: User copies the opponent's Ability.

moves.name: Rock Wrecker
moves.effect: User must recharge next turn.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.effect: Boulders are hurled at the foe. It also lowers the foe's speed by one stage.
moves.tier2: BP: 60. The area in a Burst 1 radius around the target becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Rock) for two turns.
moves.tier3: BP: 75.The area in a Burst 2 radius around the target becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Rock) for two turns. [Slowed 1.](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc)

moves.name: Rock Throw
moves.effect: Drops rocks on the enemy.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. The ground in a Burst 1 area around the target becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Rock) for two turns.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.effect: The user slugs the foe with a shattering punch. It can also smash cracked boulders. May lower opponent's Defense.
moves.tier2: BP: 40. Lower Defense by one stage.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. Lower Defense by one stage, then repeat unless target's Defense has a negative stat stage. End all effects increasing target's [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.effect: Large boulders are hurled at the opposing team to inflict damage. May cause flinching.
moves.tier3: BP: 90. Affected Pokemon are Flinched. The ground in the area of effect becomes [Difficult Terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Rock) for two turns.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.effect: The user polishes its body to reduce drag, raising speed by two stages.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The user cannot be affected by forced movement until their next turn.

moves.name: Rock Climb
moves.effect: The user Attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. It may also confuse the target. The user may replace Rock Climb's charge by climbing any amount of distance instead; when used this way, Rock Climb gains a double edge.

moves.name: Rock Blast
moves.effect: Hurls boulders at the foe 2 to 5 times in a row. BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 6, 9, 12

moves.name: Roar of Time
moves.effect: User must recharge next turn.

moves.name: Roar
moves.effect: A terrifying roar that drives the target away. The user can inflict [Fear ](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc)3 or force a Trainer to swap to a random available Pokémon.

moves.name: Reversal
moves.effect: The lower the user's HP, the higher the power.

moves.name: Revenge
moves.effect: Power increases if user was hit first.

moves.name: Return
moves.effect: The more the user likes you, the more powerful this move. Return’s base power is equal to 10 times the user’s Friendship. Return can be used as a [Charge](/1d9e9a6e5854818a98eeecdd9a976e5e) move by spending an additional 5 PP.

moves.name: Retaliate
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if a teammate fainted on the last turn.

moves.name: Rest
moves.effect: The user takes a brief nap. Until the user's turn after the following turn, it is [Immobilized](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57), [Trapped](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57), and cannot take actions, maneuvers, or reactions. This fully restores the user's HP and heals all status conditions.

moves.name: Relic Song
moves.effect: May put the target to sleep.

moves.name: Refresh
moves.effect: The user rests to cure itself of a poisoning, burn, or paralysis.

moves.name: Reflect Type
moves.effect:
The user changes its type to the type(s)
of the target. This change lasts until
the end of battle.
moves.tier3: Until the user's next turn, it resists damage of those type(s) one stage further.

moves.name: Reflect
moves.effect: Increases user's Defense by two stages, and creates a mild force field around the user. Ally Pokemon within the force field also have their Defense increased by two stages. Reflect’s range always reflects the most recent tier result.
moves.tier2: Increase the range of Reflect to [Burst ](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)4
moves.tier3: Increase the range of Reflect to [Burst ](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)6. The user can impose a double bane to any move used within the force field.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.effect: User's used hold item is restored.

moves.name: Recover
moves.effect: A self-healing move that restores HP by up to half of the user's maximum HP.

moves.name: Razor Wind
moves.effect: Blades of wind hit the foe on the 2nd turn. T1: The user creates a fierce whirlwind on their current square extending 4 squares vertically. T2: The user selects the area of effect and makes a Power Roll, directing the whirlwind down that line.

moves.name: Razor Shell
moves.effect: The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This attack may also lower the target's Defense stat. Up to two times per combat, Razor Shell can be used with a Target 4 range.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.effect: The foe is hit with a cutting leaf.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.effect: Spins the body at high speed to strike target. User is freed from [Seeded, Grabbed and Trapped](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc) statuses, ends enemy [Binding](/1d9e9a6e58548186825ff26ae4522a00) and [Vortex ](/2d6e9a6e585480a285c8d19a763347be)moves, and clears any enemy entry hazards and trap effect areas within a [Burst 6](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. Raise the user's speed by one stage.

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.effect: Makes it rain for 5 turns.

moves.name: Rage Powder
moves.effect: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Moves used by enemy Pokemon within range until the user's next turn must target the user and cannot target any other Pokemon, and enemy areas of effect must place the user as close to the center of the area as possible.

moves.name: Rage
moves.effect: A non-stop attack. While this move is in use, it gains Attack power each time the user is hit in battle. Rage continues until the user leaves the battle.
moves.tier1: BP: 20. Until their next turn, the user's Attack increases by one stage whenever damaged by an enemy's Contact move
moves.tier2: BP: 20. Until their next turn, the user's Attack increases by one stage whenever damaged by any enemy move.
moves.tier3: BP: 20. Until their next turn, the user's Attack increases by one stage whenever they take damage.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.effect: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. It boosts the user's Sp. Attack, Sp. Defense, and speed stats by one stage each.
moves.tier3: Gain one [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stage until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Quick Guard
moves.effect: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves. [Priority](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) moves used by opponents this turn do not affect the user's team.
moves.tier3: The user and all allies gain a [Recovery](https://www.notion.so/Recoveries-Respites-211e9a6e585480dc8a11fa27c4ca0378#211e9a6e585480dc8a11fa27c4ca0378).

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.effect: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. When used as a [Priority](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) move, the user may move up to their speed to a square adjacent to the target before making their attack. They lose their turn for that round.

moves.name: Quash
moves.effect: Moves the target to the bottom of initiative during this round of combat. This cannot change the initiative order of a Pokemon that has already had a turn during this round of combat.

moves.name: Pursuit
moves.effect: An attack move that works especially well on a foe that is switching out. Trigger: [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) Pokemon within range of the user's maximum movement speed would be switched out. Reaction: Move to a square within [Melee](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range of the target, then make a Power Roll. Double Pursuit’s base power when used this way.

moves.name: Punishment
moves.effect: Power increases when opponent's stats have been raised.

moves.name: Psywave
moves.effect: The foe is Attacked with an odd, hot energy wave. The Attack varies in intensity corresponding to the user's level.
moves.tier1: Deals damage equal to the user's level.
moves.tier2: Deals damage equal to 1.5x the user’s level, rounded up.
moves.tier3: Deals damage equal to 1.5x the user’s level, rounded up. The user can extend the range of Psywave to Cone 5.

moves.name: Psystrike
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.effect: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. Psyshock inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Psycho Shift
moves.effect: Transfers user's status condition to the opponent.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.effect: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Psycho Boost
moves.effect: Sharply lowers user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.effect: The foe is hit by a strong telekinetic force. It may also reduce the foe's Sp. Defense stat.
moves.tier3: BP: 105. Slide 5. [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)'s Sp. Defense is lowered by one stage.

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.effect: Copies the opponent's stat changes.

moves.name: Psybeam
moves.effect: A peculiar ray is shot at the foe. It may leave the foe confused.

moves.name: Protect
moves.effect: Protects the user from enemy moves. If the user’s last used move was Protect, Protect fails on a roll of 14 or lower. T: An opponent uses a move.
moves.tier1: The user cannot be damaged by the triggering move.
moves.tier2: The user cannot be damaged by any move that targets it until its next turn.
moves.tier3: The user cannot be damaged by any move until its next turn.

moves.name: Present
moves.effect: The user Attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. It restores HP sometimes, however.
moves.tier3: Heal the target for 1/4 of their maximum HP. On a critical hit, the user can elect to use the healing option or deal damage (BP: 120).

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.effect: User's own Attack and Defense switch.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.effect: User and opponent swap Attack and Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Power Split
moves.effect: Averages Attack and Sp. Attack with the target.

moves.name: Power Gem
moves.effect: The user Attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. The user can refract the light to extend the Power Gem's area of effect up to 3 squares in any direction from the original endpoint.

moves.name: Powder Snow
moves.effect: May freeze opponent.

moves.name: Pound
moves.effect: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

moves.name: Poison Tail
moves.effect: The user hits the target with its tail. The user can pay one additional PP to extend Poison Tail's range to [Target 2](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e).

moves.name: Poison Sting
moves.effect: The foe is stabbed with a poisonous barb of some sort. It may also poison the target.

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.effect: Poisons opponent.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.effect: The target is stabbed with a tentacle or arm steeped in poison. This may also poison the target. Test

moves.name: Poison Gas
moves.effect: A cloud of poison gas is sprayed in the faces of opposing Pokémon, poisoning those it hits.

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.effect: The user bites the foe with toxic fangs. It may also leave the foe badly poisoned.

moves.name: Pluck
moves.effect: The user bites the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, Pluck gains an edge, and the user eats it and gains its effect.

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.effect: An attack that fires many needle-like projectiles from the body. When Pin Missile hits four or more times, the target gets [Bleed 2](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57). BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 7, 9, 12

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.effect: The user Shifts up their speed. Make one Power Roll that targets up to three enemy Pokemon, each of whom were or became adjacent to the user during the Shift. The user must use Petal Dance again on the following turn unless the effect has ended. Petal Dance ends immediately if the user does not target any Pokemon during the Shift.
moves.tier1: BP: 100. Petal Dance ends and the user becomes [Confused 4](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) unless this is the first turn of Petal Dance.
moves.tier2: BP: 120. Petal Dance ends and the user becomes [Confused 4](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) unless this is the first or second turn of Petal Dance.

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.effect: Any Pokémon in play when this Attack is used faints in 3 turns.

moves.name: Peck
moves.effect: The foe is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn.

moves.name: Payback
moves.effect: The user attacks in retribution. If the user was damaged by the enemy during this round, this attack's power will be doubled.

moves.name: Pay Day
moves.effect: Numerous coins are hurled at the foe. Money is earned after battle.
moves.tier1: BP: 30. The value of the coins created is equal to the level of the user.
moves.tier2: BP: 40. The value of the coins created is equal to the level of the user times two.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. Enemy Pokémon adjacent to the target are also dealt damage. The value of the coins created is equal to the level of the user times two.

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.effect: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally shares the combined HP with the target.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.effect: Sharply lowers user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.effect: User Attacks for 2-3 turns but then becomes confused.

moves.name: Ominous Wind
moves.effect: The user attacks with a gust of horrible wind that makes targets' skin crawl. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.
moves.tier3: BP: 75. Raise the user’s Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed.

moves.name: Odor Sleuth
moves.effect: Odor Sleuth ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) modifiers to never miss and can target a Pokemon that the user cannot see. Ghost-type targets can be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type moves for the rest of combat. Odor Sleuth gains a double edge when targeting Pokemon without Incorporeal.
moves.tier3: The target's [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) is reset, and moves that target it get an edge until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Octazooka
moves.effect: May lower opponent's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Nightmare
moves.effect: A [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4) foe is shown a nightmare. While [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4), they lose 1/4th of their max HP each turn. Nightmare ends when the target is no longer [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4), and fails if the target is not [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4) to begin with.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.effect: The user slashes the foe the instant an opportunity arises. It has a high critical-hit ratio. The user can pay an additional 3 PP to target any Pokemon the user has been adjacent to previously in this battle.

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.effect: The user makes the foe see a mirage. Inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.effect: May lower opponent's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Needle Arm
moves.effect: The user Attacks by wildly swinging its thorny arms. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Nature Power
moves.effect:
This Attack becomes a different move
depending on the environment surrounding
the user. The Pokemaster can determine the move in Sp. circumstances.

Building, city, plains: Tri Attack
Cave: Power Gem
Sand, dirt, rock: Earth Power
Clear Water: Hydro Pump
Swamp, Marsh: Mud Bomb
Ice: Ice Beam
Volcano, Fire: Lave Plume
Forests, foliage, jungle: Energy Ball
Ruins, burial ground: Shadow Ball
Flying, sky: Air Slash
Snow: Frost Breath

moves.name: Natural Gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the user's held berry.

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.effect: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. It raises the user's Sp. Attack by two stages.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The user's next Reaction move gains an edge.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.effect: May lower opponent's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Mud-Slap
moves.effect: Mud is hurled in the foe's face. Lowers affected Pokémon’s [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Mud Sport
moves.effect: The user kicks up mud on the battlefield, weakening Electric-type moves. Pokemon within the area of effect resist Electric-type damage one step further.
moves.tier2: Mud Sport lasts for 4 turns. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Ground).
moves.tier3: Mud Sport lasts for 5 turns. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Ground). Pokemon within the area of effect resist Electric-type damage an additional step.

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.effect: The user Attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the foe. It also reduces the target's speed by one stage.

moves.name: Mud Bomb
moves.effect: The user launches a hard-packed mud ball to attack. It may also lower the target's accuracy.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. Lower Accuracy. Mud Bomb also hits all combatants in a [Burst 1 ](/213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)range around the target.

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.effect: User recovers HP. Amount varies with the weather.

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.effect:
User recovers HP. Amount varies with the weather. 

Tier 0: restores no HP
Tier 1 (All weather except for harsh sunlight): restores ¼ total HP
Tier 2 (No weather): restores ½ total HP
Tier 3 (Harsh sunlight): restores ⅔ total HP
moves.tier2: You may have Moonlight’s range become Burst 1. Other Pokémon affected by Moonlight heal one tier lower.
moves.tier3: You may have Moonlight’s range become Burst 2. Other Pokémon affected by Moonlight heal one tier lower.

moves.name: Mist Ball
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Mist
moves.effect: All ally Pokemon within the area of the effect cannot gain stat change stages. The area of effect may be dispersed with a significant wind.
moves.tier1: Mist's area of effect persists for three turns.
moves.tier2: Mist's area of effect persists for four turns.
moves.tier3: Mist's area of effect persists for five turns.

moves.name: Mirror Shot
moves.effect: May lower opponent's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c). Mirror Shot can be used without line of effect to target enemies around a corner from the user; the user can spend an additional 4 PP to extend the range by 4 squares and curve around an additional corner.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. Lower the target’s Accuracy by two stages.

moves.name: Mirror Move
moves.effect: The user counters the move last used by the foe with the same move. Trigger: A Pokemon uses a move.

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.effect: A triggered move that responds to special attacks, inflicting huge retaliatory damage. Trigger: This Pokemon is dealt special damage. Note the damage taken. The target of Mirror Coat becomes the source of the triggering damage.

moves.name: Miracle Eye
moves.effect: Miracle Eye ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) modifiers to never miss and can target a Pokemon that the user cannot see. Dark-type targets can be hit by Psychic-type moves for the rest of combat. Miracle Eye gains a double edge when the user has less than a 1/4 of their maximum HP.
moves.tier3: The target's [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) is reset, and moves that target it have a +1 Critical Range until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Minimize
moves.effect: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which raises its [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) by two stages.
moves.tier3: The user gains +1 to all movement speeds until the end of combat.

moves.name: Mind Reader
moves.effect: The user senses the foe's movements with its mind. The user’s next move that targets that Pokémon is guaranteed a Tier 3 result.
moves.tier3: Any move that targets Mind Reader’s target is guaranteed a Tier 3 result until the user’s next turn.

moves.name: Mimic
moves.effect: Mimic becomes a copy of the move last used by the target Pokemon. It reverts to Mimic when the user is swtiched out, faints, or the battle ends. Mimic ignores stat change stages to [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) or [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Milk Drink
moves.effect: The user drinks delicious milk to restore its HP. Outside of battle, Milk Drink can be used to heal other partied Pokemon; each use will transfer 20% of the user's HP, up to the target's maximum HP. The move will not work if the user has 20% or less HP left.
moves.tier1: Restore 1/3 of the user’s max HP.
moves.tier2: Restore 1/2 of the user’s max HP.
moves.tier3: Restore 2/3 of the user’s max HP. Gain a surge.

moves.name: Metronome
moves.effect: Roll 1d559 (figure it out), then consult the move table to determine which move this Pokemon uses.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.effect: May raise user's Attack.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.effect: A horrible sound like scraping metal is emitted to reduce the foe's Sp. Defense stat by two stages.
moves.tier1: Lower Defense by one stage instead.
moves.tier3: Enemy trainers cannot use items until this Pokemon's next turn.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.effect: The target is raked with steel claws. May raise user's Attack.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. Raise the user's Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Metal Burst
moves.effect: Deals damage equal to 1.5x opponent's Attack.

moves.name: Memento
moves.effect: User faints, sharply lowers opponent's Attack and Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Mega Punch
moves.effect: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.effect: The target is Attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

moves.name: Mega Drain
moves.effect: User recovers half the HP inflicted on opponent.

moves.name: Meditate
moves.effect: The user meditates to awaken the power deep within its body and raise its ATK stat by one stage.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.effect: Opponent cannot flee or switch.

moves.name: Me First
moves.effect: The user cuts ahead of the target to copy and use the target's intended move with greater power. Trigger: [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) enemy Pokemon uses a damaging move.
moves.tier1: Apply a bane to the user's copied move.
moves.tier3: Apply a bane to the target’s move.

moves.name: Magnitude
moves.effect: A ground-shaking attack of random intensity. Instead of making a Power Roll, roll 2d6 and multiply the result by 10 to determine Magnitude's base power.

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.effect: User becomes immune to Ground-type moves for 5 turns.

moves.name: Magnet Bomb
moves.effect: The user launches steel bombs that stick to the target. Magnet Bomb's Power Roll ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Magma Storm
moves.effect: Traps opponent, damaging them for 4-5 turns.

moves.name: Magical Leaf
moves.effect: Ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) modifiers to always hit. The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target.

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.effect: Suppresses the effects of held items for five turns.

moves.name: Magic Coat
moves.effect: Reflects moves that cause status conditions back to the Attacker. The target becomes the original Attacker, and the user can select a new origin point (and vector) for any area of effect within a Target 12 range. Trigger: This Pokemon is targeted by or in the area of effect of a move with the Status, Stat Lower, or Restriction tag.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.effect: The user throws a punch at blinding speed.

moves.name: Luster Purge
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Lunar Dance
moves.effect: The user faints but the next Pokémon released is fully healed.

moves.name: Lucky Chant
moves.effect: The user chants an incantation toward the sky, preventing opposing Pokémon from rolling critical hits for the rest of the combat.
moves.tier3: Increase ally [Critical Range](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) by 1 for the remainder of combat.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.effect: The user makes a swift Attack on the target's legs, which lowers the target's speed by one stage.
moves.tier2: BP: 65. The target is knocked prone.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. The target is knocked prone. The user can knock any other adjacent targets prone as well.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.effect: Low Kick gets an edge against heavier opponents.
moves.tier3: BP: 65. [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) is knocked prone and loses any positive Attack stages.

moves.name: Lovely Kiss
moves.effect: With a scary face, the user tries to kiss the target. If it succeeds, the target becomes drowsy.

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.effect: The user takes sure aim at the foe. The user’s next move is guaranteed a Tier 3 result.
moves.tier3: Increase the critical range on the user’s next move by 2.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.effect: Increases user's Sp. Defense by two stages, and creates a mild force field around the user. Ally Pokemon within the force field also have their Sp. Defense increased by two stages. Light Screen’s range always reflects the most recent tier result.
moves.tier2: Increase the range of Light Screen to [Burst ](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)4.
moves.tier3: Increase the range of Light Screen to [Burst ](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e)6. Moves that deal Sp. damage used by enemies outside of the force field cannot target Pokemon or points within the force field.

moves.name: Lick
moves.effect: May paralyze opponent.

moves.name: Leer
moves.effect: The foe is given an intimidating leer with sharp eyes. The target's Defense stat is reduced.
moves.tier3: Affected Pokemon get a bane to their next power roll.

moves.name: Leech Seed
moves.effect: Plants a Seed on the target if it hits. If the user already has planted a Seed, the existing Seed vanishes.
moves.tier1: Drain 1/16th of the seeded target's maximum HP at the end of its turn.
moves.tier2: Drain 1/8th of the seeded target's maximum HP at the end of its turn.
moves.tier3: Drain 1/8th of the target's maximum HP at the end of its turn. If the target faints, make another [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) roll for a target within range. If it succeeds, transfer the Seed to the new target.

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.effect: User recovers half the HP inflicted on opponent.

moves.name: Leaf Tornado
moves.effect: May lower opponent's [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.effect: Sharply lowers user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
