moves.tier3: BP: 60. Enemies that make Contact with the user until the user's next turn are [Burned 1](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4).

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.effect: The user Attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.
moves.tier1: BP: 70. Up to one other Pokemon in a [Burst 2](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) radius around the target loses 1/16th of their maximum HP.
moves.tier2: BP: 70. Up to two other Pokemon in a [Burst 2](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) radius around the target lose 1/16th of their maximum HP.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. Up to three other Pokemon in a [Burst 3](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) radius around the target lose 1/16th of their maximum HP.

moves.name: Flail
moves.effect: The lower the user's HP, the higher the power. this is going to be so annoying lol

moves.name: Fissure
moves.effect: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target instantly faints if it hits. Ignore all [accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) modifiers for this move; instead, roll 1d00 then make a Power Roll to determine the move's success. Add 30 to the 1d100 roll when targeting a Pokemon that is underground.
moves.tier2: Cutoff: 80. The square below the target becomes a pit 5 squares deep.
moves.tier3: Cutoff: 70. The user may remove any terrain in a line between it and the target, causing each affected square to become a pit 5 squares deep.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.effect: Pokémon lose 1/16th of their max health each turn while within the vortex. When a Pokémon moves through the vortex barrier, it loses 1/4th of its maximum HP and gets [Burned ](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc)1.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.effect: The foe is punched with a fiery fist. It may leave the foe with a burn.

moves.name: Fire Pledge
moves.effect: Added effects appear if combined with Grass Pledge or Water Pledge.

moves.name: Fire Fang
moves.effect: May cause flinching and/or burn opponent.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.effect: The opposing team is Attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn. The weather within the area of effect becomes Harsh Sunlight and the terrain within the area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Fire). Creatures that end their turn in Fire Blast's active area of effect are Burned 1.
moves.tier1: BP: 60. Fire Blast lasts until next turn.
moves.tier2: BP: 110. Fire Blast lasts for two turns. [Burn 1.](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)
moves.tier3: BP: 110. Fire Blast lasts for three turns. [Burn 2.](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)

moves.name: Final Gambit
moves.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user's remaining HP. User faints.

moves.name: Fiery Dance
moves.effect: May raise user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.effect: The user draws up close to the foe disarmingly, then hits without fail. Feint Attack ignores the user’s negative [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and the opponent’s positive [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) modifiers.

moves.name: Feint
moves.effect: Only hits if opponent uses Protect or Detect in the same turn.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.effect: The user covers the foe with a mass of down that lowers the Attack stat by two stages.
moves.tier3: Fire-type moves get a double edge against the target until its next turn.

moves.name: False Swipe
moves.effect: A restrained attack that always leaves the foe with at least 1 HP.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. The user can give the next move the target uses a double bane.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.effect: The user feigns crying to lower the foe's Sp. Defense by two stages.
moves.tier3: [Infatuate](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) by the user if their Sp. Defense is -3 or lower.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.effect: An attack that hits first and always causes the foe to [flinch](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc). Usable only on this Pokemon’s 1st turn of combat.

moves.name: Facade
moves.effect: The user invokes its bravery to attack. Facade's base power doubles if the user is burned, poisoned, or paralyzed. [Burn](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4) does not halve the damage dealt by Facade.
moves.tier3: BP: 85. All ally Pokemon with status conditions gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b).

moves.name: ExtremeSpeed
moves.effect: A blindingly speedy charge Attack that moves with priority. When this move is used on the user's turn, double all of the user's movement speeds for the rest of the turn. Once per combat, ExtremeSpeed may be used as a maneuver to double the user’s movement speeds until end of turn.

moves.name: Extrasensory
moves.effect: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. Extrasensory can target Pokemon that the user cannot see. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Explosion
moves.effect: The user Attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.effect: Stronger when the user's HP is higher.

moves.name: Entrainment
moves.effect: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target's Ability the same as the user's.
moves.tier3: The target gets a bane to moves that target the user until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Energy Ball
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Endure
moves.effect: If the user has at least 2 HP, the triggering damage reduces their health to 1 HP. T: The user takes any damage.

moves.name: Endeavor
moves.effect: Reduces opponent's HP to same as user's.
moves.tier2: The user can Shift 2 if the opponent lost 50% or more of their max health.
moves.tier3: The user can Shift 5 if the opponent lost 50% or more of their max health.

moves.name: Encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to continue to use the move it used last. When you target an ally Pokemon, they gain an edge on Power Rolls for that move while Encore is active.

moves.name: Ember
moves.effect: The foe is attacked with small flames. Pokemon may also be left with a burn.

moves.name: Embargo
moves.effect: Imposes [Embargo](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57). Prevents the foe from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.
moves.tier3: [Embargo 6](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57). Add a turn to the target's other current status conditions.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.effect: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. Electroweb inflicts damage and then lowers the speed of affected Pokemon by one stage.
moves.tier2: BP: 55. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Electric) until the user's next turn.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Electric) for the next two turns.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.effect: The faster the user, the stronger the attack. Electro Ball gets +X to its Power Roll, where X is the number of initiative slots between the user and the target. If the user moves first in the round and the target moves last, double Electro Ball’s damage. If X is negative, halve Electro Ball’s damage.
moves.tier2: BP: 75. Increase the user’s movement speeds by 1 until end of turn.
moves.tier3: BP: 90. Increase the user’s movement speeds by 1 for the rest of this combat.

moves.name: Egg Bomb
moves.effect: A large egg is hurled with maximum force at the foe to inflict damage.
moves.tier3: BP: 115. The user may elect to have the egg explode to deal 20 damage to all Pokemon within one square of the target.

moves.name: Echoed Voice
moves.effect: The user Attacks the target with an echoing voice. When used consecutively, double the base power from 40 up to a maximum of 160. If Echoed Voice fails or the user is switched out, reset the base power.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.effect: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes those around it. The resulting damage is doubled for all Pokemon in range that are underground.
moves.tier3: BP: 115. All other Pokemon within range are knocked prone.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.effect: The foe is punched with the user's full, concentrated power. It confuses the foe if it hits.

moves.name: Dual Chop
moves.effect: The user Attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row. Make a separate Power Roll for each hit.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.effect: High critical hit ratio.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.effect: A corkscrewing attack with the sharp beak acting as a drill.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. The user may Shift 1, then gains 3 squares of flying speed.

moves.name: Dream Eater
moves.effect: An Attack that works only on [Drowsy](https://www.notion.so/Non-Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4#211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4) or Sleeping foes. If the foe is Sleeping, the base power is doubled.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.effect: User recovers half the HP inflicted on opponent.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.effect: In battles, the opponent switches. In the wild, the Pokémon runs.
moves.tier3: BP: 75. You may [Push 4](/1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) or elect to force a targeted Pokémon’s Trainer to swap to a random available Pokémon.

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.effect: May cause flinching.

moves.name: Dragon Rage
moves.effect: The foe is stricken by a shock wave. This attack always inflicts 40 HP damage. The user can pay an additional 5 PP to extend the range to Burst 2 or 10 PP to extend the range to Burst 3.
moves.tier3: The user may exempt up to one Pokémon from Dragon Rage. Weaken 2.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.effect: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and speed stats by one stage each.
moves.tier3: The user may Shift 3 and add 3 to any of its movement speeds until the end of its next turn.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.effect: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.effect: An incredible blast of breath that may paralyze target.
moves.tier2: BP: 60. The user can elect to make Dragon Breath's area of effect [Line 5](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e).
moves.tier3: BP: 75. The user can elect to make Dragon Breath's area of effect [Line 7](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) or [Cone 4](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e). Paralyze 3.

moves.name: Draco Meteor
moves.effect: Sharply lowers user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Double-Edge
moves.effect: A reckless, life-risking tackle in which the user charges the target. This also damages the user by 1/3rd of the damage dealt.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.effect: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to raise its [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c). Once per combat, Double Team may also be used as a maneuver to double the user’s movement speeds until end of turn.
moves.tier3: Double all movement speeds until end of turn.

moves.name: Double Slap
moves.effect: The target is slapped repeatedly, back and forth, two to five times in a row. Make a single [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) roll to determine whether all strikes hit or miss. BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 8, 9, 12

moves.name: Double Kick
moves.effect: Two legs are used to quickly kick the foe twice in one turn. Make two Power Rolls for Double Kick.
moves.tier3: BP: 40. The next time a Pokémon faints as a result of a Double Kick strike this turn, the user can make another Power Roll against a target within range.

moves.name: Double Hit
moves.effect: Hits twice in one turn.

moves.name: Doom Desire
moves.effect: Damage occurs 2 turns later.

moves.name: Dizzy Punch
moves.effect: A rhythmic punch that may confuse the target. This move gains an edge if an ally has used a Sound move this turn.

moves.name: Dive
moves.effect: Dives underwater on first turn, Attacks on second turn.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.effect: A flare of electricity is loosed around the user. It may also cause paralysis.

moves.name: Disable
moves.effect: [Target](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) Pokemon cannot use its last used move for a few turns. If the target has not yet moved in this combat, Disable will fail.
moves.tier1: The move is disabled for the target's next 3 turns.
moves.tier2: The move is disabled for the target's next 4 turns.
moves.tier3: The move is disabled for the target's next 5 turns. If the move had a PP cost, the target loses that much PP.

moves.name: Dig
moves.effect: The user burrows, then Attacks on the second turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons. T1: User gains +5 to its burrow speed until the end of its next turn.  T2: make Power Roll & execute move during turn.

moves.name: Detect
moves.effect: Protects the user from enemy moves. If the user’s last used move was Detect, Detect fails on a roll of 14 or lower. T: An opponent uses a move.
moves.tier1: The user cannot be damaged by the triggering move.
moves.tier2: The user cannot be damaged by any move that targets it until its next turn.
moves.tier3: The user cannot be damaged by any move until its next turn.

moves.name: Destiny Bond
moves.effect: If the user faints before the user's next turn, the opponent also faints.

moves.name: Defog
moves.effect: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen as well as moves with the Hazard or Cloud tag.

moves.name: Defenseend Order
moves.effect: Raises user's Defense and Sp. Defense. Defenseend Order gets an edge during autumn.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.effect: Curls up to conceal weak spots and raises Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Dark Void
moves.effect: Puts all adjacent opponents to sleep.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.effect: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Cut
moves.effect: The target is cut with a scythe, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. Cut may inflict [Bleed](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).

moves.name: Curse
moves.effect:
If the user is a Ghost-type Pokémon, the user loses 50% of its max HP and the
target is [Cursed](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57), losing 25% of its HP each turn. If the user is not a Ghost-type Pokémon
, its speed is decreased and its Attack and Defense are increased by one stage each.

moves.name: Crush Grip
moves.effect: More powerful when opponent has higher HP.

moves.name: Crush Claw
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Defense.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.effect: The user crunches up the foe with sharp fangs. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.
moves.tier3: BP: 95. The target's Defense is lowered by one stage.

moves.name: Cross Poison
moves.effect: A slashing Attack with a poisonous blade that may also leave the target poisoned.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.effect: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed.
moves.tier3: BP: 120. Cross Chop can target an additional enemy adjacent to the original target.

moves.name: Crabhammer
moves.effect: The foe is hammered with a large pincer.

moves.name: Covet
moves.effect: The user endearingly approaches the foe, then steals the item the foe is holding. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.
moves.tier3: BP: 75. The target gets a bane to the next Power Roll they make to target Covet's user.

moves.name: Counter
moves.effect: A triggered move that responds to physical attacks, inflicting huge retaliatory damage. Trigger: This Pokemon is dealt Physical damage by an enemy in [Melee](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range. Note the damage taken.

moves.name: Cotton Spore
moves.effect: The user releases cottonlike spores that cling to the foe, lowering opponent's speed by two stages.

moves.name: Cotton Guard
moves.effect: Drastically raises user's Defense.

moves.name: Cosmic Power
moves.effect: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Defense stats by one stage each. If stars or any lunar bodies are visible to the user, gain two surges.

moves.name: Copycat
moves.effect: The user mimics the last used move during this battle. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

moves.name: Conversion 2
moves.effect: The user changes its type to a random type that resists or is immune to the move type that last hit it. Conversion2 cannot change the user to any of its current types. It will fail if the user already has all types that resist the type of the last damaging move.

moves.name: Conversion
moves.effect:
The user changes its type to the type
of a move it knows. This change lasts until
the end of battle.
moves.tier3: Until the user's next turn, it resists damage of that type one stage further.

moves.name: Constrict
moves.effect: The target is attacked with long, creeping tentacles, vines, or the like. The target’s speed is sharply lowered while grabbed.
moves.tier3: The target gets a double bane to Escape Grab rolls. Increase Constrict’s damage to 1/8th of the target’s maximum HP.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.effect: May confuse opponent.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.effect: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that triggers confusion.

moves.name: Comet Punch
moves.effect: The target is hit with a flurry of punches that strike two to five times in a row. This move deals 1.5x damage against Fossil Pokemon.  Make a single [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) roll to determine whether all strikes hit or miss. BP: 18. Mulitistrike: 8, 9, 12

moves.name: Coil
moves.effect: The user coils up and concentrates. This raises its [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c), Attack and Defense by one stage each.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The next Bite move used by this Pokemon gains an edge.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.effect: Lowers user's Defense and Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Clear Smog
moves.effect: The user sends a stream of strange smog towards the target. Clear Smog deals damage and removes all stat change stages from the target.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b) for each stat stage removed from the target.

moves.name: Clamp
moves.effect: The target is clamped and squeezed by the user's very thick and sturdy shell. The grabbed Pokémon cannot use its last used move.
moves.tier3: The target gets a double bane to Escape Grab rolls. Increase Clamp’s damage to 1/8th of the target’s maximum HP.

moves.name: Circle Throw
moves.effect: In battles, the opponent switches. In the wild, the Pokémon runs.

moves.name: Chip Away
moves.effect: Looking for an opening, the user strikes consistently. The target's Defense and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) stat changes don't affect this Attack's damage or Power Roll.
moves.tier3: BP: 85. Reduce either the target's Defense or [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) by one stage, unless the change would make that stat change stage negative.

moves.name: Chatter
moves.effect: The user Attacks using a sound wave based on words it has learned. This confuses the target.

moves.name: Charm
moves.effect: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This lowers its Attack stat by two stages.
moves.tier2: If the target's Attack stage is -3 or lower, [Infatuate 1](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).
moves.tier3: If the target's Attack stage is -3 or lower, [Infatuate 3](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).

moves.name: Charge Beam
moves.effect: May raise user's Sp. Attack.

moves.name: Charge
moves.effect: [Charge](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e) raises the user's Sp. Defense by one stage.
moves.tier2: The next Electric-type move used by this Pokemon deals double damage.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b).The next Electric-type move used by this Pokemon deals double damage.

moves.name: Captivate
moves.effect: Affected enemy Pokémon are charmed, lowering Sp. Attack by two stages.
moves.tier3: The user may have the area of effect become burst 3 or give Captivate [Infatuate 2](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57).

moves.name: Camouflage
moves.effect: Changes user's type according to the location, becoming Normal indoors, Rock within caves, Grass in forests or plains, etc. The PokeMaster can determine the new type in Sp. circumstances.
moves.tier3: The user can retain their previous type as a secondary typing if they wish.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.effect: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Attack and Sp. Defense stats by one stage each.
moves.tier3: Gain a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b). The user is no longer Confused.

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.effect: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. Bullet Seed hits two to five times in a row. Each strike has [Push 1](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 6, 9, 12

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.effect: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.effect: All affected Pokemon have their speed lowered by one stage. For an additional 6 pp, the user may [Charge ](/1d9e9a6e5854818a98eeecdd9a976e5e)before executing Bulldoze.
moves.tier2: BP: 60. Affected Pokemon are knocked prone.
moves.tier3: BP: 75. Affected Pokemon are knocked prone. The area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Ground) for 2 turns.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.effect: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting both its Attack and Defense stats. The user's [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) increases by one.

moves.name: Bug Buzz
moves.effect: May lower opponent's Sp. Defense.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.effect: The user bites the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, Bug Bite gains an edge, and the user eats it and gains its effect.

moves.name: Bubble Beam
moves.effect: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the opposing team. It may also lower their speed stats.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. Lower the speed of each Pokemon in the area of effect by one stage.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.effect: A spray of countless bubbles is jetted at the foe. It may also lower the target's speed stat.
moves.tier3: BP: 50. Lower target's speed by one stage.

moves.name: Brine
moves.effect: Power doubles if opponent's HP is less than 50%.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.effect: The user Attacks with a swift chop. When Brick Break targets a Pokemon under the effect of Light Screen, Reflect, or Aurora Veil, end that move's effect before dealing damage.
moves.tier3: BP: 90. End all effects increasing target's [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). Reduce the target's [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) to 0 until the user's next turn.

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.effect: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes serious damage. Brave Bird's charge ignores the user's [Fear](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) status.
moves.tier2: BP: 120. [Push 2](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). The user is cured of Fear.
moves.tier3: BP: 140. [Push 5](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). Gain two surges. The user is cured of Fear.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.effect: Springs up on first turn, Attacks on second. May paralyze opponent.

moves.name: Bonemerang
moves.effect: The user throws the bone it holds. The bone loops to hit the target twice, coming and going. Make two Power Rolls for Bonemerang.
moves.tier3: BP: 60. Select an additional target in range; Bonemerang also hits that target once.

moves.name: Bone Rush
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn. multiturn template

moves.name: Bone Club
moves.effect: The user clubs the foe with a bone. It may also make the target flinch. Bone Club can also be used as a ranged move with [Target 4](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e); it costs an additional 3 PP to be used this way.

moves.name: Bolt Strike
moves.effect: May paralyze opponent.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.effect: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. It may also leave the target with paralysis. Double the base power of Body Slam if the target has used Minimize, the user is more than two sizes larger than the target, or the user is falling from a height of 3 or more squares onto the target.

moves.name: Blue Flare
moves.effect: May burn opponent.

moves.name: Block
moves.effect: Opponent cannot flee or switch.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.effect: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike the opposing team. It may also freeze them solid. The weather within the area of effect becomes Hail and the terrain within the area of effect becomes [difficult terrain](https://www.notion.so/Difficult-Terrain-211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704#211e9a6e585480b4b1c1ee9138791704) (Ice). Creatures that end their turn in Blizzard's active area of effect get Frostbite 1.
moves.tier1: BP: 110. Blizzard lasts until next turn.
moves.tier2: BP: 110. Blizzard lasts for two turns.
moves.tier3: BP: 110. Blizzard lasts for three turns.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.effect: High critical hit ratio. May burn opponent.

moves.name: Blast Burn
moves.effect: User must recharge next turn.

moves.name: Bite
moves.effect: The foe is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. It may make the target flinch.

moves.name: Bind
moves.effect: Things such as long bodies or tentacles are used to bind and squeeze the target. Moves that target the [Grabbed](https://www.notion.so/Volatile-Conditions-211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc#217e9a6e585480dd81e5f7aeea790f57) Pokemon gain an edge while Bind is active.
moves.tier3: The target gets a double bane to Escape Grab rolls. Increase Bind’s damage to 1/8th of the target’s maximum HP.

moves.name: Bide
moves.effect: The user endures Attacks for two turns, then strikes back to retaliate. T1: begin tracking damage. This pokemon cannot take use moves until T3.  T2: -- T3: make Power Roll & execute move during turn.

moves.name: Bestow
moves.effect: Gives the user's held item to a target within range, without fail. Bestow fails if the user doesn't have a held item or if the target already has a held item.
moves.tier1: The user may grant the target a [surge](https://www.notion.so/Surges-213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b#213e9a6e58548098a24ef4f25eb3690b).
moves.tier2: The user may grant the target two surges.
moves.tier3: The user may grant the target three surges.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.effect: Maximizes Attack while sacrificing HP. The user's Attack stage becomes +6, but it loses HP equal to half its maximum HP. Belly Drum fails if the user's current HP is less than half its maximum HP.
moves.tier3: Increase Attack by one stage for all allied Pokemon in a [Burst 1](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) radius.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.effect: The user and all allies within a [Burst 3](/213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range of the target can make a Power Roll for Beat Up. Sum the base power outputs of the power rolls for damage calculation. Each Pokemon who makes a power roll for Beat Up makes contact with the target, but only the user deals damage.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.effect:
The user is recalled to its Poke ball.
Another readied Pokémon can be sent out as a free action. The incoming Pokémon receives
all stat stage modifiers the user had before being recalled.

moves.name: Barrier
moves.effect: Increases user's Defense by two stages.
moves.tier3: The user may select up to 3 squares within a [Burst 3](https://www.notion.so/Range-AOE-213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e#213e9a6e585480e3913bf0d13b1e115e) range to become impassable translucent blocks of psychic energy.

moves.name: Barrage
moves.effect: Hurls round objects at the foe 2 to 5 times. Each strike has [Push 1](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f). BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 8, 9, 12

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.effect: Power doubles if user took damage first.

moves.name: Autotomize
moves.effect: The user sheds part of its body to make itself lighter and raise its speed stat by two stages. The user's weight decreases by 100 kg (220 lbs) and its [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f) becomes 0. Autotomize cannot decrease the user's weight below the minimum 0.2 lbs (0.1 kg)
moves.tier3: Gain a surge. Until the end of the next turn, increase all of the user's movement speeds by the difference between its previous and current [Stability](https://www.notion.so/Forced-Movement-1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f#1dbe9a6e5854806e970cf1916823937f).

moves.name: Aurora Beam
moves.effect: A rainbow-colored beam. It may lower the foe's Attack stat.
moves.tier3: BP: 80. Lower Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.effect: The user looses a blast of aura power from deep within its body. Aura Sphere's Power Roll ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c).

moves.name: Attract
moves.effect: The target becomes infatuated and less likely to Attack.

moves.name: Attack Order
moves.effect: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. Critical hits land more easily. Attack Order gets an edge during the summertime.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.effect: The user Attacks the foe while shouting in a startling fashion. It may also make the target flinch. Astonish gets an edge against targets with Fear.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.effect: Power doubles if opponent already took damage in the same turn. Assurance gets an edge if the target is prone.
moves.tier3: 75. If the opponent has taken damage in this round, Fear 1.

moves.name: Assist
moves.effect: The user selects a move at random from the collective known moves of all ally Pokemon, then performs that move.

moves.name: Aromatherapy
moves.effect: The user releases a soothing scent that heals status conditions.
moves.tier1: The user and all allies are healed of all [non-volatile status conditions.](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)
moves.tier2: The user, all allies, and all partied Pokémon are healed of all [non-volatile status conditions.](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4)
moves.tier3: The user, all allies, and all partied Pokémon are healed of all [non-volatile status conditions](/211e9a6e5854807c9db2fd370e0240f4) and all [volatile status conditions.](/211e9a6e585480ca9529da3727d677cc)

moves.name: Arm Thrust
moves.effect: The user lets loose a flurry of open-palmed arm thrusts that hit two to five times in a row. Make a single [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) roll to determine whether all strikes hit or miss. BP: 15. Mulitistrike: 6, 9, 12

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.effect: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.effect: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. Make a Power Roll for Aqua Ring at the end of every turn.
moves.tier1: The user heals for 1/16th of its maximum HP.
moves.tier2: The user heals for 1/8th of its maximum HP.
moves.tier3: The user heals for 1/8th of its maximum HP. Increase the user's [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) by one stage until the beginning of the user's next turn.

moves.name: Aqua Jet
moves.effect: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.effect: The user Attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also raise all the user's stats at once.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. The user's Attack, Defense, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defense, and speed increase by one stage each.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.effect: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns, raising Sp. Defense by two stages.
moves.tier3: Remove any status effects acquired since the user's last turn.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.effect: The user teleports using a strange power. Exchange the user and the target's locations. Ally Switch can only target a willing Pokemon.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.effect: The user Attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. It may also make the target flinch. Air Slash gains an edge during Fog or when targeting a Pokemon within the area of effect of a Cloud move.

moves.name: Air Cutter
moves.effect: The user launches razor-like wind to slash the opposing team.

moves.name: Agility
moves.effect: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. It sharply boosts the speed stat.
moves.tier3: Increase speed by two stages. Until end of next turn, Contact moves used by this Pokemon gain an edge.

moves.name: After You
moves.effect: The user helps the target make its move faster. The target takes the next turn in initiative order, then skips its following turn. Trigger: a turn ends.

moves.name: Aeroblast
moves.effect: A vortex of air is shot at the foe to inflict damage. Aeroblast’s [Critical Range](/293e9a6e58548091be8fd75eb6ecd14b) is increased by 2.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.effect: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. Aerial Ace ignores [Accuracy](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) and [Evasion](https://www.notion.so/Accuracy-Evasion-211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c#211e9a6e585480699f17eca20149430c) to always hit.
moves.tier3: BP: 75. Aerial Ace hits all enemy Pokemon the user became adjacent to during the [Charge](https://www.notion.so/1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e?v=1d9e9a6e5854818cbcdb000ce23dc4bb#1d9e9a6e58548039a37df77b067bf65e).

moves.name: Acupressure
moves.effect: Make a Power Roll for Acupressure, then select a stat at random (Attack, Defense, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defense, and speed). The user gains two stages to the stat.
moves.tier3: Disqualify one stat of your choice from the random selection.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.effect: The user nimbly strikes the target. If the user is not holding an item, double Acrobatic's base power.
moves.tier2: BP: 55. Acrobatics checks made by the user this turn gain an edge.
moves.tier3: BP: 70. Acrobatics checks made by the user this turn gain a double edge.
